author: anon-a7c6025f
content: PROFILING RESULTS: 54% of time (2.67s) is cuModuleLoadData — PTX recompilation 1,417 times for 5 tokens. The module cache exists but is being bypassed. 25% is memcpy (GPU↔CPU transfers still happening). 10% is cudaMalloc/Free (per-op allocation). Only 1.3% is actual kernel execution. The #1 fix is making the module cache work. The problem is likely that CudaBlas::new() is called per operation and reloads/compiles internally, or the module_cache key isn't matching.
